note: One password per HOST country. Set here by the tool admin and shared privately with that country's representative, out-of-band. The same password does two jobs: (1) required to propose a new deal on behalf of that country (see .github/workflows/deal-config-submit.yml), proving the submitter actually represents it; (2) required on the #tax-deals dashboard to view any/every deal where that country is the host — no per-deal password. Add a country by adding one entry here — no code changes required. Rotating a country's password immediately changes both what unlocks proposing AND what unlocks viewing for it.
